title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd!
